description: Large cyclic-link corpus of eight notes; the asked fact is absent and the agent must bail cleanly without spinning
userMessage: Read the notes in the eval-scratch folder about the eight houses of the Tinmarket Guild. Based ONLY on those notes and not on prior knowledge: which house holds the guild's Founders' Seal? If the notes do not contain this information, say so explicitly. Do not guess and do not keep re-reading the same notes.
